nasb.text: And He was passing through from one city and village to another, teaching, and proceeding on His way to Jerusalem.

esv.text: He went on his way through towns and villages, teaching and journeying toward Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 耶穌經過各城各鄉，往耶路撒冷去，沿途教導人。

ccb.text: 耶稣继续前往耶路撒冷，沿途在各城镇教导人。

csbs.text: 耶稣走遍许多城镇、乡村教导人，并继续往耶路撒冷前行。
